delivery-aggregator.last_summary: Read raw Azure Codex session 019e1fac-d077-71a2-848f-995342f830e7 and source micro-step artifacts MS01-MS39. User's original objective in the trail is accurate price positioning plus accurate offer placing, not SEO/menu polish. Confirmed source roles: Swiggy DATA is order-volume demand; Zomato MG Road is rank-price perception; HE menu workbook is platform surface; POS is SKU universe; playbook is offer mechanic library. Found main drift: MS35 over-corrected toward no-offer as final strategy, while MS36 corrected that offers are mandatory but role-based/proof-gated. MS39 corrected context-collapse risks: missing Swiggy units/AOV, missing taxonomy, and direct-name price divergence. Saved audit note at _context/Delivery_Aggregator_Direct_API_2026-05-25/azure-session-019e1fac-microstep-context-audit.md. No portal/D1/POS/Odoo mutation.

pos-write.title: 09 POS Write
pos-write.last_task: Captain POS session-expired gap + refund audit
pos-write.last_summary: Deep-audited Captain POS operational issue on HE production test.hamzahotel.com after tablet showed Odoo Server Error / Session expired during payment validation. Verified this was Captain-only: Cash and Ground POS sales continued, Captain config/session/pricelists/payment methods remained healthy, and V2 Captain offer pricing itself was correct. Found Captain backend sequence 2670-6 had local/server save gaps after repeated stale-tab payment attempts: user water test saved as 2670-6-000006, photographed ₹746.35 order was later re-entered and saved as 2670-6-000005 with matching lines/table/payment, leaving only 2670-6-000004 unresolved. May 1-current Captain sequence audit found historical missing 2662-6-000127 between 20 May 2026 03:05:54 IST and 14:38:26 IST, likely around previous-day closing/new-session transition. Read-only audited refund order 8059: HE - Captain - 000035 REFUND is currently a paid negative refund for -₹125 at 25 May 2026 03:03 IST, linked to original order 7731 from 22 May 2026; user explicitly stopped any correction, so no write was performed.
pos-write.next_action: Do not mutate refund order 8059 unless Nihaf explicitly resumes and confirms. Operationally, staff must confirm whether 2670-6-000004 was a real second bill or just a failed duplicate local slot; if real, re-enter that bill from staff/KDS/payment evidence. For Captain tablets, close stale POS tabs, reload/login fresh before payment validation, then verify new Captain order sequence saves in backend.
pos-write.mutation_status: No new mutation in this follow-up. Read-only Odoo/POS audits only; previous V2 pricelist mutation remains unchanged. Refund 8059 was not modified because user said wait/don't do anything.

events.task: Audit Late Night campaign 96-click leak before budget move
events.summary: Read-only deep audit of Late Night campaign 23854158442 before any budget mutation. Live all-period stats: 1,678 impressions, 96 clicks, ₹3,168.82 spend, avg CPC ₹33.01, 0 Google conversions. Click concentration: Open Now Near Me ad group took 81/96 clicks and ₹2,764.50 spend; Biryani/Kabab took 10 clicks/₹292.26; Late Night Bangalore took 4 clicks/₹87.53; Non Veg Halal took 1 click/₹24.54. Top keyword was exact 'restaurants near me open now' with 35 clicks/₹1,178.96 and Quality Score 1/below-average landing + predicted CTR. Top reported search term was 'restaurants nearby' with 21 clicks/₹694.71; reported search terms explain only 39/96 clicks, so Google withholds many query details. Landing proof: /go/google-night is a 200 HTML landing page with buttons, not a direct Maps redirect. /api/google-ads-landing-event shows 66 pageviews, 15 maps clicks, 3 calls, 1 WhatsApp, 1 menu over 30d; therefore only about 15.6% of Google clicks became Maps taps and only 1% became WhatsApp. Root issue: broad generic near-me restaurant demand + non-direct landing funnel, not enough high-intent Maps/dish conversion.
events.next_action: Do not move all budget blindly. Recommended correction before/with budget move: tighten Late Night toward dish/open-now intent, reduce generic near-me spend or force direct directions landing, and add measurement for gclid/source on directions; then reallocate Dinner/Brand budget only after rollback-safe budget readback.
events.mutation_status: read-only audit only; no budget or keyword mutation

events.task: Debug Zomato direct cURL replay
events.summary: Root cause was local parser error: the direct puller parsed -H headers but ignored cURL -b/--cookie, so Zomato CSRF headers were replayed without browser cookies and returned 401. Patched scripts/aggregator-direct-partner-pull.mjs to include -b cookies and added safe Zomato history summaries. Dry-run now returns Zomato HTTP 200 with 10 snippets and hasMore=true; no ingest/deploy/mutation performed.
events.next_action: Use Copy as cURL exactly as captured; direct puller can now replay Zomato get-all-v2 from saved Downloads/zomato-curl.txt. Next gate is optional ingest dry-run review, then controlled API ingest only after approval.
events.mutation_status: none - local parser fix and read-only dry-run replay only

Swiggy direct API path is proven: POST https://rms.swiggy.com/orders/v1/fetchOrders replays successfully with access_token/accesstoken headers and no cookie, returning live data; latest replay showed 1342887=NCH and 1342888=HE, confirming HE Swiggy ID 1342888.
